title: selliguea wardii
intro: Selliguea wardii, also known as Pilea wardii or Ward's Pilea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Selliguea wardii include its potential to treat fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. In traditional herbal preparations, Selliguea wardii is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
